reasoning: SPY at 706.88, sandwiched between premarket low 706.71 and premarket high 707.13 in an extremely tight $0.42 overnight range. BEAR ribbon inversion (spread 126¢) + rising VIX (+7.54%) + gap-down overnight (-$3.17) signal bearish lean despite the price trap. Battle level is 706.71 (premarket low, Active support) — the first defense. If it holds on test from above, price could target 708-709. If it breaks, next support is 705.76, then 705.0. Carry resistance 712.39 is $5.51 above, requiring ribbon reclaim for a bullish failure.

primary.condition: if SPY holds 706.71 on first retest

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks below 706.71 (PMH fails to reclaim)

tertiary.condition: if SPY breaks above 708 and ribbon reclaims (fast EMA > slow)

key_observations: Overnight action trapped in a $0.42 range (706.71 to 707.13) — today's first battle will be: can bulls defend PMH, or does price flush toward PML?
BEAR ribbon stack + rising VIX create a bearish undertone; if early sellers overwhelm overnight buyers, 706.71 will be tested sharply on open
If 706.71 gives way, 705.76 (yesterday's RTH low, Active tier) is the next line of defense; a break below that reaches the 705.0 round-number floor
Carry resistance 712.39 is $5.51 above — only accessible if price clears 708-709 AND ribbon reverses to bull stack
Reference S1 pivot (706.41) is $0.47 below current price; it may provide micro-support on any early dip
